# `hidebordery`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>HideBorderY( [byte] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[byte] - 0 = 25 rows, 1 = 24 rows</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Sets screen rows to 25 (0) or 24 (1).</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
HideBorderY(0); // 25 rows
HideBorderY(1); // 24 rows
</code>


</div>
